title: relay/store: activate_subscription_atomic prevents double-grant via single transaction
description: activate_subscription_atomic (relay/store.rs line 1049) atomically sets the subscription expiry AND deletes the invoice in one transaction with a monotonic-max UPDATE (takes whichever expiry is later). This correctly handles the edge case where a second payment arrives for the same invoice (payment confirmed twice by watcher), a slow watcher that rescans the same block, and the case where the user already has a longer subscription than the new payment would provide. A contributor might suggest splitting into two operations for 'simplicity'. That would re-open the double-grant window. This design is correct and must not be simplified.
